summary: P2 Proctor view + Waiting Room smoke + structural verification PASSED. End-to-end live student-join flow is BLOCKED by an expired EOC window: only one published test exists (Biology 1, EOC 2026-05-04 → 2026-05-08) and today is 2026-05-11, so the student-facing getOpenTestsForCourse returns no open tests for Daania. Proctor UI, daily-code regression, start-disabled-when-zero-joined, and section-detail launcher all verified.

integration_issues.flow: Student joins waiting room (steps 2-6 of request)
integration_issues.issue: Cannot exercise: the only published test (Biology 1) has its EOC window ending 2026-05-08 and today is 2026-05-11. StudentTestSelector → getOpenTestsForCourse returns []. No 2026-05-11-active test exists in DB. This is the same blocker called out at the end of iteration_9.json — user needs to either extend Biology 1's eoc_closes_at via Admin → Tests → Edit, or publish another test with today's date inside its BOC/EOC window.

issues: Recharts containers warn 'width(-1) and height(-1)' on initial paint (6x repeated). Charts still render correctly after layout settles, but the noisy warnings should be suppressed by giving the Recharts ResponsiveContainer a non-zero min-width/min-height.

action_items: Extend the Biology 1 EOC window (eoc_closes_at) past today (2026-05-11) via Admin → Tests → Edit, OR publish a second test whose BOC or EOC window includes today. Without an open test for at least one section, steps 2-6 of the review_request (student joins → teacher starts → student goes to Q1 → teacher pauses → teacher ends → auto-submit) cannot be executed end-to-end.
Optional polish: silence the recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings on the teacher dashboard by setting an explicit min-width/min-height on ResponsiveContainer wrappers (cosmetic only).
critical_code_review_comments: Proctor.jsx onPause uses window.prompt — fine for v0 but breaks the consistent shadcn AlertDialog UX used elsewhere on the page (Start/End). Consider replacing with a small Dialog so the reason field can be styled, validated, and tested via data-testid.

StudentWaitingRoom.jsx silently swallows non-Error rejection shapes by stringifying via JSON.stringify(e). If a Supabase RPC returns {message,details,hint,code}, only `message` will surface cleanly; rest gets serialized. Use the same `err?.message || err?.details || err?.hint || JSON.stringify(err)` pattern already used in StudentTestCode.jsx for consistency.

Proctor.jsx polling interval (4 s) keeps firing even after the AlertDialog 'End test' is open — there is a small race where a Refresh between End-click and confirm could change state.session.status mid-render. Consider clearing pollRef when an AlertDialog is open, or guard onEnd against a stale session.id.

SectionRoster.jsx line 91 only renders the 'Proctor a test' launcher when `tests.length > 0`. For courses with no linked tests, the section detail page silently omits the launcher with no hint. Consider showing a disabled state + 'No tests linked to this course yet' helper text so teachers don't think the feature is missing.

success_rate.frontend: Structural: 100% (5/5 verifiable steps PASS: launcher render, proctor route load, code render, counts, disabled-start). Live end-to-end: BLOCKED (4 of 9 review_request steps cannot run without an open test window).

test_credentials: super@hpa.test / HPATestUser123 (verified, used for Biology 1 proctor view since teacher@hpa.test has no Biology sections — only US History/Econ/Government). teacher@hpa.test / HPATestUser123 also verified for login + /admin/sections list (14 SOC sections). Student 300699 Daania verified login earlier in iteration_9.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Steps 1, 7, 8, 9 of the review_request are VERIFIED PASS:
  - Test #1 (Proctor route renders): /admin/sections/8bdcad7b-1fea-4d7f-904d-7fbd5cf26705/proctor/c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4/EOC — Biology 1 (Chandler, Karen, Highland Prep). Code 'YQJ9C6' rendered in mono. session-status='Waiting room'. counts 26/0/0/0/0.
  - Test #7 (Start disabled at 0 joined): VERIFIED — proctor-start button has disabled attribute when count-joined=0.
  - Test #8 (super_admin /admin/sections regression): VERIFIED — 962 sections searchable, drill-down to detail works.
  - Test #9 (daily code regression): VERIFIED via proctor-code element showing 6 uppercase alnum chars.
Steps 2-6 (student joins → teacher starts → mid-test pause → end-session auto-submit) are BLOCKED. To unblock, the main agent should: (a) sign in as super_admin, go to /admin/tests, click Edit on Biology 1, set eoc_closes_at to a future date (e.g. 2026-06-30), save; (b) re-run this iteration's playwright flow but in two browser contexts — context A = super_admin on /admin/sections/<bio-section>/proctor/<bio-test>/EOC; context B = student app with a Daania-style ID in that section. Student needs to be ENROLLED in section 8bdcad7b... — Daania 300699 may not be in Chandler Karen's section. Use the section detail roster to pick an actual student_id from the rendered table (e.g. 300432 Nathaniel Abrica, 300499 Alexander Argento, etc.). The student flow: /student/login → enter ID → /student/courses → pick Pre-AP Biology 1 tile → /student/test-code/<enrollmentId>/<testId>/EOC → paste 'YQJ9C6' (or whatever today's code is) → /student/waiting/<attemptId> → wait 5s → teacher clicks proctor-start + proctor-start-confirm → student auto-redirects to /student/test/<attemptId>.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA — end-to-end student join blocked: The Biology 1 EOC window is configured for 2026-05-04 → 2026-05-08 in test_courses/tests table. Today (per the live Supabase project clock visible at https://soaagmzmecutvlxfbscl.supabase.co) is 2026-05-11. The student-facing api.js → getOpenTestsForCourse RPC filters tests where current_timestamp BETWEEN boc_opens_at AND boc_closes_at OR BETWEEN eoc_opens_at AND eoc_closes_at, returning [] for any course whose test windows are outside today. Reproduction: visit /student/courses as 300699 Daania → click Pre-AP Biology 1 → 'No open tests right now' empty state appears. Mitigation: extend Biology 1 EOC window (eoc_closes_at) via Admin → Tests → Edit, OR insert a new test whose BOC opens today and closes in 30 days. Note: the P2 SQL (p2_waiting_room.sql) itself appears to have applied successfully — no PGRST202 'function not found' errors observed when the Proctor view called teacher_get_or_create_session, teacher_session_state, and get_or_create_daily_code; session was created, state polled, code retrieved without any visible XHR failures or red banners.
